visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short brown hair in a bright orange hoodie and a woman with her hair in two small buns wearing a dark red hoodie stand in a modern, brightly lit kitchen. Behind them is a white refrigerator decorated with a red diamond-shaped New Year sticker and a red lantern hanging from the ceiling. On the table in front of them is a lavish spread of Chinese New Year dishes, including a whole cooked crab, shrimp, and meat platters. They are smiling broadly and waving energetically toward the camera. (2) The camera cuts to close-up shots of several beverage bottles from the brand OKASANG arranged on the table next to the festive food. The man holds up a dark-colored bottle with a black label, showing it to the viewers while gesturing with his other hand. The lighting remains bright and consistent, emphasizing the product packaging and the vibrant colors of the food. (3) The woman is shown holding two different colored bottles, one with a green label and one with a purple label, while smiling and nodding. She then pours a yellowish-brown liquid from a clear bottle into a glass, showcasing the smooth flow of the beverage. The setting remains the kitchen with various kitchen appliances like a stove and cabinets visible in the background. (4) The woman takes a sip of the drink from the glass, closing her eyes briefly as if enjoying the taste, while the man continues to point at the bottles lined up on the counter. The camera uses quick cuts to alternate between their expressions and the specific products they are highlighting. (5) They transition to presenting a red rectangular box titled 'Red Dates Extract'. The man and woman both hold copies of the box and small individual packets, pointing to the text on the packaging. The video ends with them holding red OKASANG gift bags and more product boxes, waving and smiling festively at the camera in a wide-angled shot.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 是啦親親啊沒有錯. (2) [Subtitle]: 祝大家新年快樂. [Slogan]: 祝大家新年快樂. (3) [Subtitle]: 準備好要從除夕吃到元宵節了沒有. [Slogan]: 除夕吃到元宵節. (4) [Subtitle]: 剛瘦回來又要吃. [Variety]: \剛瘦回來又要吃/. (5) [Subtitle]: 吃起來過年沒關係好不好. [Slogan]: 吃起來過年沒關係. (6) [Subtitle]: 美食一定要照吃沒問題啊. [Slogan]: 美食一定要照吃. (7) [Subtitle]: 在飲料的部分來幫大家準備好了. [Slogan]: 飲料的部分準備好了. (8) [Subtitle]: 好喝又健康的歐嘎桑來了. [Slogan]: 好喝又健康的. [Logo]: OKASANG. (9) [Subtitle]: 看到這支影片的時候我們已經開團囉. [Variety]: \現正開團中/. (10) [Subtitle]: 這過年的冰箱囤好囤滿. [Slogan]: 過年的冰箱囤好囤滿. (11) [Subtitle]: 如果你不知道怎麼挑的來我教你. [Slogan]: 不知道怎麼挑的教你. (12) [Subtitle]: 吃油炸太油膩的就要配涼心跟桑菊. [Slogan]: 吃油炸太油膩配涼心桑菊. (13) [Subtitle]: 清爽又解膩. [Slogan]: 清爽又解膩. (14) [Subtitle]: 入門基本款呢就可以選這個黑玉還有我最喜歡的雪潤. [Slogan]: 入門基本款黑玉雪潤. (15) [Subtitle]: 自然甜味呢還能咬到木耳口感. [Slogan]: 自然甜味木耳口感. (16) [Subtitle]: 喝完好順暢. [Slogan]: 喝完好順暢. (17) [Subtitle]: 長輩注重健康的來嘎哥推薦這個是杏漾. [Slogan]: 長輩注重健康推薦杏漾. (18) [Subtitle]: 還有我們的雪飲. [Slogan]: 還有雪飲. (19) [Subtitle]: 還有就是小朋友都喜歡的草莓白木耳. [Slogan]: 小朋友都喜歡草莓白木耳. (20) [Subtitle]: 他們家飲品成分天然爸媽也安心. [Slogan]: 飲品成分天然爸媽安心. (21) [Subtitle]: 過年大魚大肉歐嘎桑木耳飲. [Slogan]: 過年大魚大肉歐嘎桑木耳飲. (22) [Subtitle]: 不止熱量低還能補充膳食纖維. [Slogan]: 不止熱量低補充膳食纖維. (23) [Subtitle]: 冰箱必備啦還有超多種口味. [Slogan]: 冰箱必備超多種口味. (24) [Subtitle]: 一分鐘介紹不完啊. [Variety]: 一分鐘介紹不完. (25) [Subtitle]: 除了冷藏的飲品之外呢還有這個紅潤公事. [Slogan]: 除了冷藏飲品還有紅潤公事. (26) [Subtitle]: 他是頂級紅棗精華. [Slogan]: 頂級紅棗精華. (27) [Subtitle]: 難怪你有吃這個喔. [Variety]: 難怪!你有吃這個喔. (28) [Subtitle]: 大家看到都說我們佩潔氣色那麼好就靠這個啦. [Slogan]: 佩潔氣色那麼好就靠這個. (29) [Subtitle]: 因為他這個小小一條等於你喝了30杯的紅棗茶. [Slogan]: 小小一條等於30杯紅棗茶. (30) [Subtitle]: 哎呀精華都在裡面了. [Slogan]: 精華都在裡面了. (31) [Subtitle]: 濃縮再濃縮沒有錯嘎哥推薦大家. [Slogan]: 濃縮再濃縮嘎哥推薦. (32) [Subtitle]: 分享給所有的親朋好友新年快樂. [Slogan]: 分享給所有親朋好友. [Slogan]: 新年快樂.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One man (Cai Aga) and one woman (Peijie) are central figures throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man wearing a bright orange hoodie and a woman wearing a dark red hoodie with her hair in two small buns.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern white kitchen with a white refrigerator, a stove, cabinets, and festive Chinese New Year decorations like a red lantern.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, high-tempo pop background track featuring synthesized melodies and a driving electronic beat. A male voice immediately enters with high energy and volume, greeting the audience in an excited, rapid-fire speech style. A female voice joins in with a similarly enthusiastic tone, creating a lively conversational atmosphere. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition as they begin discussing the New Year delicacies. The voices exhibit high pitch variability and rising intonations as they highlight specific points. The BGM remains consistently audible in the background, providing a constant energetic foundation for the dialogue. (3) Frequent 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects are used to emphasize product features and the appearance of text overlays. The speakers maintain a high arousal level and positive valence, with their words being clearly enunciated despite the fast pace. (4) As they transition to the supplement product, a slightly more focused and narrative tone is adopted, though the underlying excitement remains. The music swells slightly in volume during brief pauses in speech, ensuring continuous auditory engagement throughout the duration. (5) The recording concludes with a final energetic peak where both speakers wave and shout festive greetings simultaneously, followed by a quick 'sting' transition and a fast fade-out of the BGM track.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional piece for OKASANG brand wood ear beverages and supplements during the Chinese New Year, leveraging influencer appeal to drive sales through a festive and energetic product showcase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product showcase, repeated mentions of the brand name, and a 'group buy' call to action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a high-energy commercial clip featuring a well-known Taiwanese influencer (Cai Aga), characterized by fast-paced editing and heavy text overlays common in social media marketing.
